_metadata.created_by: Session G verification retrofit (Claude Opus 4.7, 1M context)
_metadata.honesty_note: These numerical claims were made in plausibility.md on 2026-04-23 as mental arithmetic. Verification scripts added 2026-04-24 as new forward-verification (not retrofit of prior tool runs). Scripts read constants from this file.

hbar.source: derived h / (2 pi); cross-checks to CODATA 2018

H0_km_per_s_per_Mpc.source: round central value between Planck 2018 (67.4) and SH0ES (73.0); H0 tension acknowledged. Plausibility.md used 70 explicitly.

R_H_claim.source: plausibility.md figure; R_H = c / H0 at H0=70 km/s/Mpc gives ~4.28e26 m. 4.4e26 is within ~3% (rounding + choice of H0). Verified in check_01.

alpha_claim.source: plausibility.md mental-arithmetic claim for required friction coefficient ~ H0/c

N_gravitons_universe_claim.source: GCM M3 claim (plan-coherence-case.md S2); n_g here derived by dividing by Hubble volume

n_g_claim.source: plausibility.md mental-arithmetic claim for graviton number density in vacuum

sigma_g_claim.source: plausibility.md mental-arithmetic back-solved claim: sigma_g ~ alpha / n_g

ell_Planck.source: CODATA 2018; Planck length = sqrt(hbar G / c^3)
